trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

international_content.observation: The presence of a Japanese title, such as the 'Chainsaw Man – Assassins Arc Official Trailer 2', suggests a significant interest in international content.
international_content.insight: Content creators should consider exploring and collaborating on international projects to capture a global audience, particularly in anime and Japanese pop culture.

gaming_and_pop_culture.observation: Videos related to gaming ('Meccha Chameleon', 'Zenless Zone Zero', 'NEW GTA 6') and superhero franchises ('SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY') dominate the list.
gaming_and_pop_culture.insight: Capitalizing on gaming and superhero franchises can be lucrative. Channels should focus on creating content around major game releases and popular franchises to capture trending interest.

mixed-content_variety.observation: The titles vary from sleep relaxation ('Fall asleep while I build a zoo') to analysis and breakdown ('SPIDER-MAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN!').
mixed-content_variety.insight: Diversifying content types to include both entertainment and educational/informative segments can attract a broader audience.

single_video_channels.observation: Each top channel listed only has one video trending, indicating a highly competitive environment.
single_video_channels.insight: Channels should focus on creating high-quality, unique content to stand out, as a single trending video can significantly elevate a channel's visibility.

collaboration_and_cross-promotion.observation: Diverse content creators such as 'Sony Pictures Entertainment' and 'IGN' are trending alongside individual creators.
collaboration_and_cross-promotion.insight: Collaboration between large entities and individual creators can be mutually beneficial to expand reach. Consider partnerships or joint projects.

anime_and_japanese_media.observation: The popularity of the 'Chainsaw Man' trailer indicates a strong market for anime content.
anime_and_japanese_media.insight: Investing in anime-related content, such as reviews, reactions, and merchandise, can tap into this enthusiastic audience.

gaming_community_engagement.observation: Consistent interest in gaming content suggests opportunities for community engagement through live streams and interactive content.
gaming_community_engagement.insight: Creators should consider leveraging platforms like Twitch alongside YouTube to host live streams and engage with the gaming community in real-time.

content_breakdowns_and_analysis.observation: Videos providing breakdowns and detailed analysis suggest a demand for in-depth content.
content_breakdowns_and_analysis.insight: Producing comprehensive breakdowns, Easter egg finds, and expert analyses can attract viewers interested in detailed content consumption.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
